automation_types.description: Attach to existing logged-in Chromium sessions through remote debugging.

automation_types.description: File chooser, input[type=file], iframe, upload verification and retry.

automation_types.description: PowerShell, paths, quoting, ports, processes, service startup.

automation_types.description: Handle blockers around menus, dialogs, popups, frames and overlays.

automation_types.label: Persistent browser daemon for agent QA
automation_types.description: Long-lived Chromium daemon architecture with persistent sessions, cookie import, CAPTCHA handoff, and security isolation for agent-driven browser testing.

automation_types.label: Browser QA with persistent session
automation_types.description: Real browser QA workflows using persistent Chromium sessions — form testing, login-state testing, screenshot verification, and regression testing without cold-start overhead.
